configurePresets.name: firmware-vcp
configurePresets.description: Cross build, PC link over the ST-LINK VCP (P5a). Links probe_f042.elf when vendor/ is present (see vendor/README.md); init is RM0091-verified but not yet hardware-validated.

configurePresets.name: firmware-usb-cdc
configurePresets.description: Cross build, PC link over the native USB-CDC device (P5b, PA11/PA12). Separate binary dir from firmware-vcp so the cached PROBE_PC_TRANSPORT cannot leak between transports.

configurePresets.name: tests
configurePresets.description: Native host build (no ARM toolchain) — builds + runs the relay unit tests.
